title: gymnogramma villosula
intro: Gymnogramma villosula, also known as the hairy fern or feather fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Gymnogramma villosula are often made into teas, infusions, or poultices, which are used to apply the plant's medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
